visual_description: In a dimly lit room with large blinds, three men sit around a dark table. The man in a white shirt and tie faces a man in a blue denim shirt who looks down at papers, while a third man with his back to the camera watches them. A laptop and scattered documents lie on the table, and the lighting highlights the central figures.
